payload.note: Eastern Star Holdings Ltd (screened) is flagged for investigation due to inconsistencies with Eastern Star Holding Company (matched). The screening party's country (GB), incorporation date (2018-07-07), and identifier (GBEST4433) do not align with matched party details showing incorporation in SY on 2009-03-09, a different country (SY), and the identifier SY-EST-9001. Hard contradictions exist between the screened and matched data regarding country, date, and identifiers. Sparse corroborating information exists for these fields. Analyst investigation is required to resolve discrepancies before final disposition, including verifying official registration documents for both parties and gathering additional geographic and identifier corroboration.
